discovery.label: Job Discovery
discovery.description: Scrapes 50+ queries across LinkedIn, Lever, Greenhouse, Comeet, Ashby.

dedup.label: Dedup & Categorize
dedup.description: Removes duplicate listings, categorizes by DevOps, AI/ML, FinOps, etc.

customerMatch.label: Customer Match
customerMatch.description: Matches companies against 123 Develeap customers and 32 past customers.

enrichment.label: Enrichment
enrichment.description: Enriches contacts with emails, phones, titles via Apollo.io.

crmSync.label: CRM Sync
crmSync.description: Syncs company/deal/contact data from HubSpot every 2h.

review.label: Review & Select
review.description: User reviews new listings, selects contacts, picks templates.

throttle.label: Queue & Throttle
throttle.description: Queues outreach with human-like timing to avoid LinkedIn detection.

outreach.label: LinkedIn Outreach
outreach.description: Sends connection requests and messages with throttled delivery.

followUp.label: Follow-up Sequences
followUp.description: Soap Opera Sequences: Day 0 → Day 3 → Day 7 → Day 14.

responseTracking.label: Response Tracking
responseTracking.description: Track responses, mark connections, qualify leads.

if_branch.label: IF Condition
if_branch.description: Branch workflow based on a condition

crmUpdate.label: CRM Update
crmUpdate.description: Logs outreach activity back to HubSpot.
